task_completion.description: Log in to the SEB Server web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server dashboard or home screen is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Physics 301 Midterm' exam configuration page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser shows the exam list or the specific edit/details page for the exam named 'Physics 301 Midterm'.

task_completion.description: Link the 'High Security Template' to the exam.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the exam configuration settings, the 'Exam Template' field or dropdown has 'High Security Template' selected.

task_completion.description: Link the 'Campus BYOD Config' to the exam.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the exam configuration settings, the 'Connection Configuration' (or Client Configuration) field or dropdown has 'Campus BYOD Config' selected.

task_completion.description: Save the linked policies to the exam.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the exam was saved, or an overview page for 'Physics 301 Midterm' displaying both 'High Security Template' and 'Campus BYOD Config' as actively linked.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the SEB Server web interface in a browser, rather than terminal commands (like curl) making API requests.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing MySQL/MariaDB prompts or SQL UPDATE/INSERT commands being executed to link the entities.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual SEB Server application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL should point to localhost:8080 (or the expected SEB Server address) and display the authentic SEB Server interface, not a local text editor or mock HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Exam: 'Physics 301 Midterm'. Target Exam Template: 'High Security Template'. Target Connection Configuration: 'Campus BYOD Config'. These entities are pre-seeded in the system, so the agent should be able to find them in the respective dropdowns/lists without needing to create them from scratch.
